app.title: Fediverse Hub
app.subtitle: Mastodon, Pixelfed, PeerTube, Lemmy aur RSS ke liye ekikrit timeline.
login.title: Fediverse Hub me swagat hai
login.skipNotice: Sirf timeline padhne ke liye sign-in skip karein. Post karna sign-in tak disabled rahega.
register.created: Jahan instance ne anumati di, accounts ban gaye.
register.externalFallback: Kuch instances ko external registration ya verification chahiye.
register.title: Fediverse accounts banayein
register.explanation: Base account name likhen. Fediverse Hub .peer jodkar sabhi configured providers par accounts banata hai.
onboarding.title: Apni ruchi chunen
onboarding.subtitle: Apni pehli federated timeline ke liye topics chunen.
compose.title: Title
compose.published: Post demo mode me publish hua.
compose.readOnlyNotice: Read-only mode: post publish karne ke liye sign in karein.
settings.title: Settings
error.selectInterest: Kam se kam ek ruchi chunen ya valid hashtag likhen.
error.publisherMissing: Is source ke liye publisher available nahi hai.
error.postingUnsupported: Is source par posting supported nahi hai.
error.composeEmpty: Publish karne se pehle text ya media add karein.
error.videoRequired: PeerTube posts ke liye video zaroori hai.
error.communityRequired: Lemmy posts ke liye community zaroori hai.
error.mediaTooLarge: Selected files me se ek bahut bada hai.
error.mediaTypeUnsupported: Selected media type supported nahi hai.
error.readOnlyMode: Aap read-only mode me hain. Publish karne se pehle sign in karein.
error.invalidAccountName: Letters, numbers, underscore ya hyphen ke saath valid account name likhen.
error.passwordTooShort: Kam se kam 12 characters ka password use karein.
error.noProvidersConfigured: Koi Fediverse provider configured nahi hai.
error.registrationClientMissing: Is provider ke liye registration adapter available nahi hai.
